overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player ascends from a subway stairwell into a rain-slicked urban environment saturated with vibrant neon signage, navigating through narrow passages and crossing wet streets illuminated by holographic advertisements and building lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway stairwell transitioning to urban plaza

events.description: ascends stairs and emerges from enclosed stairwell into open plaza with glass buildings

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs with red accent lighting, transitioning from underground to street level

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with red LED strip lighting on the edges
modern glass facade building with blue neon illumination visible through windows
large illuminated billboard displaying a luxury vehicle advertisement with yellow text
wet reflective concrete surface at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a concrete stairwell with red accent lighting, ascending from an underground area. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens into a plaza with wet concrete flooring and a modern glass office building visible ahead, illuminated by blue neon structures and a prominent digital car advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian passage between high-rise buildings

events.description: passing from dimly lit corridor into area with prominent purple neon kiosk lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage between dark buildings, approaching a small plaza with a neon-lit kiosk

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the narrow passage

entered.detail: tall dark concrete walls of adjacent buildings creating a narrow canyon effect
small cylindrical kiosk structure with bright purple neon lighting on the roof edge
pile of garbage bags accumulated near the kiosk structure

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow pedestrian corridor flanked by dark building walls, the camera approaches a small plaza featuring a distinctive purple neon-lit kiosk. The environment transitions from the open plaza to a more enclosed urban canyon, with trash bags visible near the kiosk and occasional pedestrians passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: major neon-lit intersection with holographic advertising

events.description: exits narrow passage into wide open intersection with heavy neon signage and wet reflective streets
crossing the wide street intersection while vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt

agents.ego_description: navigating across a wide wet intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon advertisements, avoiding vehicles

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: rain-slicked black asphalt street reflecting the vibrant neon lights from surrounding buildings
bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the dark asphalt
tall building covered in green and blue neon signage with multiple advertising screens
building facade dominated by large red neon signage and yellow structural elements

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage into a vast cyberpunk intersection, the scene opens up to reveal towering buildings covered in dense neon signage reflecting off the wet asphalt. The camera crosses the wide street marked with yellow crosswalk stripes while vehicles drive through the intersection, surrounded by a moderate crowd of pedestrians and overwhelming holographic advertising.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with street-level shops

events.description: moves from open intersection onto sidewalk beneath an overpass structure
turns slightly right to follow the sidewalk curve while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing by street barriers and storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track running overhead with support columns and purple neon strip lighting underneath
metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street traffic with vertical bars
wet concrete pedestrian walkway with red painted curb lines

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open intersection onto a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure, the environment becomes more enclosed with metal street barriers on the left and building facades on the right. The wet concrete path is illuminated by purple neon strips attached to the overpass above, with sparse pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with heavy advertising and commercial signage

events.description: passing large billboard with 'CANT BREATHE' text and smoke effects, entering denser commercial district

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk through a dense urban canyon with towering neon advertisements on both sides, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk, some wearing futuristic clothing

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'CANT BREATHE' text with smoke particle effects and a portrait image
tightly packed high-rise buildings covered in multiple layers of colorful neon signs and holographic projections
pedestrian or vehicle bridge connecting buildings overhead with illuminated signage attached

segments.scene_description: The final segment progresses through a dense urban canyon where the 'CANT BREATHE' billboard dominates the left side of the view. The street becomes narrower with towering buildings on both sides covered in dense neon advertising, creating an immersive cyberpunk atmosphere. The sidewalk remains wet and reflective, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving through the heavily commercialized district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim underground stairwell into the overwhelming neon saturation of a dense cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by ascending concrete stairs with red accent lighting, emerging into a rain-slicked plaza dominated by a glass office building and blue neon structures. As the camera moves forward, the space tightens into a narrow pedestrian corridor with a purple-lit kiosk before suddenly expanding into a vast, shimmering intersection filled with holographic advertisements and vehicles crossing wet asphalt. The scene then shifts beneath the oppressive weight of an elevated highway, where purple neon strips illuminate a covered sidewalk and metal barriers. Finally, the path leads deeper into a claustrophobic urban canyon of towering buildings and reflective sidewalks, culminating in a view dominated by a massive CANT BREATHE billboard.
